arts.ttl: 'He really believes' - why Portsmouth's duo's decision is even bigger than you think
arts.sum: Pompey fans should take extra comfort from the decisions of both John Mousinho and Rich Hughes to extend their Pompey contracts.

arts.ttl: Chris Wilder rules key man out this weekend as Sheffield United welcome back midfielder to training
arts.sum: Sheffield United travel all the way down to the South Coast on Saturday afternoon to face a winless Portsmouth, while the Blades are looking to extend their 100% unbeaten run during the early stages of the new Championship season. arts.ttl: Portsmouth hero calls for huge Harry Redknapp decision ahead of former Spurs and West Ham man’s Fratton return
arts.sum: Harry Redknapp has been backed to make a return to front-line football ahead of his Fratton return.
